description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has read permissions for repository contents. It consists of multiple jobs for different platforms (Windows, Linux, macOS) and special build configurations (metrics, fuzzers, examples, etc.). Each job uses a matrix strategy to run on multiple target platforms, compilers, and architectures. The jobs check out the repository, set up a build agent, and then build and test the Botan project using a Python script.
